examples: My hubby did that for a wedding present to me!
I've also asked for more help; hubby can vacuum and youngest son loves to do Windows.
I must say that my hubby is in pretty good shape - he runs and lifts weights most days of the week.
Everyone I know noticed the dramatic changes I was making and were very impressed, especially hubby-to-be.
After all, your hubby or wifey married you because he or she loves you as an individual.
